rawMetadata: {"compiler":{"version":"0.8.26+commit.8a97fa7a"},"language":"Solidity","output":{"abi":[],"devdoc":{"kind":"dev","methods":{},"stateVariables":{"WAD":{"details":"Fixed-point scale for exp() intermediate math (1e18)"}},"title":"TWAMMBatchMath","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{},"notice":"Closed-form continuous TWAMM execution math. Implements the exact solution from the Paradigm TWAMM paper (https://www.paradigm.xyz/2021/07/twamm), Section 6. Given:   p   = current price (token1 per token0), represented as sqrtPriceX96\u00b2/Q96   k0  = sell rate of token0 (token0/sec)   k1  = sell rate of token1 (token1/sec)   L   = active liquidity   \u0394t  = elapsed seconds The TWAMM invariant is the virtual AMM with constant product x\u00b7y = L\u00b2. The closed-form ending sqrt price is:   c  = sqrt(k0 / k1)                    (equilibrium price ratio)   e  = exp(2 * sqrt(k0\u00b7k1) * \u0394t / L)   (exponential decay factor)   sqrtP_end = sqrtP_0 * (sqrtP_0 + c) + c * (sqrtP_0 - c) * e               \u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500               (sqrtP_0 + c) + (sqrtP_0 - c) * e Special case k0 = 0 or k1 = 0: one-sided execution, price moves monotonically along the AMM curve. The exp() function is approximated using a 6-term Taylor series, accurate to <0.01% for |x| < 0.5 (covers all practical TWAMM intervals). For larger exponents the series is evaluated iteratively.","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/libraries/TWAMMBatchMath.sol":"TWAMMBatchMath"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":1000000},"remappings":[":@ensdomains/=lib/v4-core/node_modules/@ensdomains/",":@openzeppelin/=lib/v4-core/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":@uniswap/v4-core/=lib/v4-core/src/",":@uniswap/v4-periphery/=lib/v4-periphery/src/",":ds-test/=lib/v4-core/lib/forge-std/lib/ds-test/src/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/v4-core/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-gas-snapshot/=lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/lib/forge-gas-snapshot/src/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":hardhat/=lib/v4-core/node_modules/hardhat/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/v4-core/lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":permit2/=lib/v4-periphery/lib/permit2/",":solmate/=lib/v4-core/lib/solmate/",":v4-core/=lib/v4-core/src/",":v4-periphery/=lib/v4-periphery/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"lib/v4-core/src/libraries/FullMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0x4fc73a00817193fd3cac1cc03d8167d21af97d75f1815a070ee31a90c702b4c2","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://c3b2d66d36b1ad56b1ab6e2eb8a816740877b40b461c93f125e88621c8378e52","dweb:/ipfs/QmPGvMZzKQvNiWKd8aRzzdW7oAizwrMgcMtnaworDkVHFC"]},"src/libraries/TWAMMBatchMath.sol":{"keccak256":"0x2eca87a8e079bf0ba47440ee5e47aa4b0423745ff73129d6ffd5520cdd4f10ca","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6c9ebcae0ed3fc83f14881349ec4e7f38ea40ce949c4358ca7d4eb85cb557e0f","dweb:/ipfs/QmSTcnXbuoL7tKmDfngN9ko2ppPa32V5kWMRh1Ez95XkZW"]}},"version":1}
